ddls:
CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "process_name" TEXT /* Name of the process being evaluated (e.g., audit inspection, calibration) */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision score for the process */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall score for the process */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score for the process */,
  "f2_score" REAL /* F2 score for the process */,
  "development_samples" INTEGER /* Number of development samples involved in the evaluation */,
  "test_samples" INTEGER /* Number of test samples involved in the evaluation */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated clinical trial */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "metric_status" TEXT /* Status of the metric (e.g., pending, reviewed, approved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES clinical_trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_process_name FOREIGN KEY ("process_name") REFERENCES processes ("process_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "processes" (
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each process */,
  "process_name" TEXT /* Name of the QA process */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the QA process */,
  "process_type" TEXT /* Type of process (e.g., audit, calibration, CAPA) */,
  "process_status" TEXT /* Current status of the process (e.g., active, pending, completed) */,
  "process_owner" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher responsible for the process */,
  "process_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the process */,
  "process_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clinical_trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clinical trial */,
  "trial_name" TEXT /* Name of the clinical trial */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trial */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trial */,
  "phase" TEXT /* Phase of the trial (e.g., Phase I, II, III) */,
  "lead_researcher" INTEGER /* ID of the lead researcher overseeing the trial */,
  "trial_status" TEXT /* Current status of the trial (e.g., ongoing, completed, on hold) */,
  "trial_location" TEXT /* Location where the trial is being conducted */,
  "trial_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the trial */,
  "trial_sponsor" TEXT /* Organization or entity sponsoring the trial */,
  "trial_protocol" TEXT /* Protocol or guidelines followed in the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clinical_trials_lead_researcher FOREIGN KEY ("lead_researcher") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the researcher belongs to */,
  "researcher_role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., lead, assistant) */,
  "researcher_specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the researcher (e.g., oncology, cardiology) */,
  "researcher_contacts" TEXT /* Additional contact information (e.g., phone, address) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "qa_audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clinical trial being audited */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process being audited */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date the audit was conducted */,
  "findings" TEXT /* Summary of findings from the audit */,
  "audit_status" TEXT /* Status of the audit (e.g., scheduled, completed, pending) */,
  "audit_supervisor" INTEGER /* ID of the supervisor overseeing the audit */,
  "audit_location" TEXT /* Location where the audit was conducted */,
  "audit_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the audit in days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_qa_audits_audit_supervisor FOREIGN KEY ("audit_supervisor") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_qa_audits_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES processes ("process_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_qa_audits_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES clinical_trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "corrective_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each corrective action record */,
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the audit record that prompted the action */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the corrective action taken */,
  "actionDate" TEXT /* Date the action was planned to be completed */,
  "action_status" TEXT /* Status of the corrective action (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  "action_supervisor" INTEGER /* ID of the supervisor responsible for the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_corrective_actions_action_supervisor FOREIGN KEY ("action_supervisor") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_corrective_actions_audit_id FOREIGN KEY ("audit_id") REFERENCES qa_audits ("audit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "preventive_actions" (
  "preventive_action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preventive action record */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process for which the action is taken */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the preventive action implemented */,
  "actionDate" TEXT /* Date the action was planned to be completed */,
  "action_status" TEXT /* Status of the preventive action (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  "action_supervisor" INTEGER /* ID of the supervisor responsible for the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preventive_action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_preventive_actions_action_supervisor FOREIGN KEY ("action_supervisor") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_preventive_actions_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES processes ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher, QA analyst) */,
  "user_full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report findings */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., QA, performance, compliance) */,
  "report_author" TEXT /* Author of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, reviewed, final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_types" (
  "audit_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit type */,
  "audit_type" TEXT /* Name of the audit type (e.g., internal audit, external audit) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the audit type */,
  "audit_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the audit (e.g., monthly, quarterly, annually) */,
  "audit_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria used for the audit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit result */,
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the audit being recorded */,
  "audit_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the audit type */,
  "result_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the audit results */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date the results were recorded */,
  "result_status" TEXT /* Status of the audit result (e.g., accepted, rejected, pending) */,
  "result_supervisor" INTEGER /* ID of the supervisor who reviewed the result */,
  "result_action" TEXT /* Actions required based on the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_results_audit_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("audit_type_id") REFERENCES audit_types ("audit_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_results_result_supervisor FOREIGN KEY ("result_supervisor") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_results_audit_id FOREIGN KEY ("audit_id") REFERENCES qa_audits ("audit_id")
)
